⭐ CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md — Modular Backend Project

# Code of Conduct — Modular Backend Project

This project follows a **professional, respectful, and collaborative** environment.  
All contributors, maintainers, and participants are expected to adhere to this Code of Conduct.

The goal is to ensure a welcoming, safe, and productive space for everyone involved in the development of this modular backend.

---

# 📌 Our Standards

We are committed to creating an environment where everyone:

### ✔ Behaves respectfully and professionally
- Treat others with kindness and empathy  
- Assume good intentions  
- Communicate clearly and constructively  

### ✔ Collaborates effectively
- Provide helpful feedback  
- Support newcomers  
- Share knowledge openly  

### ✔ Maintains a high technical standard
- Follow architectural guidelines  
- Write clean, maintainable code  
- Document changes appropriately  

### ✔ Encourages diversity and inclusion
- Welcome people of all backgrounds  
- Avoid discriminatory or exclusionary behavior  

---

# 🚫 Unacceptable Behavior

The following actions are strictly prohibited:

### ❌ Harassment or discrimination
- Offensive comments  
- Personal attacks  
- Threats or intimidation  

### ❌ Toxic or disruptive behavior
- Aggressive communication  
- Dismissing others' work without constructive feedback  
- Sabotaging discussions or PRs  

### ❌ Sharing sensitive information
- Leaking credentials  
- Exposing private data  
- Violating security guidelines  

### ❌ Ignoring architectural boundaries
- Bypassing Auth/AuthZ  
- Introducing cross-module coupling  
- Breaking Clean Architecture principles  

---

# 🧭 Responsibilities of Maintainers

Project maintainers are responsible for:

- Enforcing this Code of Conduct  
- Reviewing and moderating contributions  
- Providing guidance and clarification  
- Taking corrective action when necessary  

Maintainers have the right to:

- Edit, reject, or revert contributions that violate standards  
- Temporarily or permanently restrict participation  
- Remove inappropriate content  

---

# 🛠 Reporting Issues

If you experience or witness a violation of this Code of Conduct:

### 📩 Report privately via email:
`security-team@example.com`  
*(Replace with your preferred contact method)*

Include:

- Description of the incident  
- People involved  
- Links, screenshots, or evidence (if applicable)  
- Your preferred method of follow-up  

All reports will be handled confidentially.

---

# 🔄 Enforcement

Violations may result in:

- Warning  
- Temporary suspension from contributing  
- Permanent removal from the project  

Actions will be taken based on severity and context.

---

# 🤝 Commitment

By participating in this project, you agree to uphold this Code of Conduct and contribute to a respectful, collaborative, and high‑quality development environment.

Thank you for helping make this project a great place to build software.
